title: Whats instore for evangelion 30 and 40
wikitext:
[]: Whats instore for evangelion 3.0 and 4.0?             Quote Post by TheSophist » Fri May 14, 2010 3:33 pm well after seeing evangelion 2.0, It seems that they've covered a lot from the original series. Or is there still plot and important points missed from the original series. I was just wondering what generally speaking is going to be covered in the last two movies? assuming it carries on with the theme of analysing the psychology and relationships between the characters. Perhaps we cant compare the two anymore because the events that happend are completely new. Or shopuld we expect that both gendo and seele are still going to try and achieve their aims. Oh and are there still more angels to come? so basically is there anyway of hypothesising what could be coming? or is it so different from the orignal it could be anything?

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Fri May 14, 2010 4:52 pm There are already a ton of threads about this very subject. Oh and are there still more angels to come?

[]:             Quote Post by TheSophist » Fri May 14, 2010 5:09 pm Azathoth wrote: There are already a ton of threads about this very subject. Yes, according to Gendou. Didn't you hear Misato? サビス サビス !! Aside from that...was there ever any way? It's a safe bet that SEELE and Gendou both have the intentions they claim to have, but that doesn't speak much as to what's actually going to happen.

[]:             Quote Post by cambaprecoz » Sat May 15, 2010 4:13 pm TheSophist wrote: I'm just trying to figure out what anno's intentions are for the spirit of the films...

[]:             Quote Post by TheSophist » Sun May 16, 2010 8:35 am cambaprecoz wrote: To screw us over? To mess with our minds? Destroy evrything we have fanwanked so far? ruin our viewing experience of the original series? Fill our world with "Eva fans" who've never seen the original? to get as much cash as he possibly can out of his most succesful franchise? I can keep this up as long as I please, but won't. Cause it's annoying. But you sort of get the gist of what I'm trying to explain.

[]:             Quote Post by chee » Sun May 16, 2010 9:12 am cambaprecoz wrote: Destroy evrything we have fanwanked so far?

[]:             Quote Post by ran1 » Sun May 16, 2010 10:17 am I'm holding out for a bloody sex-ridden romp with a Bolivian Army ending. It's pretty much the only thing that would justify the troll that was 2.0

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Sun May 16, 2010 10:50 am 3rd Impact will be spliced together with a montage of a bikini carwash, in keeping with the tacky cheesecake shots we've seen so far.

[]: Re: Whats instore for evangelion 3.0 and 4.0?             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Sun May 16, 2010 11:18 am TheSophist wrote: Or shopuld we expect that both gendo and seele are still going to try and achieve their aims.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun May 16, 2010 11:55 am I expect a Kaworu centric first half. And then pure Anno goodness in the second half. Either way, don't wait up. If they're following the same schedule as the previous film we're about 6 months away from the TITLE of 3.0 being announced.

[]:             Quote Post by cambaprecoz » Sun May 16, 2010 1:58 pm TheSophist wrote: you really think its going to be a negative version , it seems more postive in the first two.

[]: Re: Whats instore for evangelion 3.0 and 4.0?             Quote Post by TheSophist » Sun May 16, 2010 2:33 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Well, that's pretty much what drives the plot, so yeah. Two more, most likely, by maths and symbolism. Well, not anything, but for the most part, we are heading into terra incognita. Personally, i don't think that the mindscrew and psychoanalysis will be taken to EoE levels, nor do i think it should be in this iteration. But that shouldn't stop the final installments from being dramatic in a mature sort of way (with at least a small helping of mindfrag). The big happy fun time with in your face fanservice and whackiness part pretty much ended with 2.0. It's time for the conspiracies to be unravelled (at least to a degree), dark origins to be shed light upon, all the while the characters struggle with outer threats and inner demons. And i have yet to lose my faith in Anno.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun May 16, 2010 2:36 pm cambaprecoz wrote: an obscure reference to a certain western film

[]:             Quote Post by Pman » Sun May 16, 2010 5:12 pm MP EVAS!! I wonder what they might look like...

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Tue May 18, 2010 4:12 pm Not really.

[]:             Quote Post by Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion » Tue May 18, 2010 4:28 pm One or two angels with powers or appearances or Arael and Armisael. That and Unit 07. That's pretty much what I'm looking forward too aside from seeing Unit 06 in action.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 24, 2010 7:16 am Twin Drive Sigma Aquarion wrote: One or two angels with powers or appearances or Arael

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Mon May 24, 2010 10:49 am What if these Angels attack different characters instead?

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon May 24, 2010 11:08 am Fallingtogrey wrote: What if these Angels attack different characters instead?

[]:             Quote Post by Fallingtogrey » Mon May 24, 2010 11:27 am Who knows?

Or is there still plot and important points missed from the original series. I was just wondering what generally speaking is going to be covered in the last two movies? assuming it carries on with the theme of analysing the psychology
